name: HCG Diet
summary: HCG should not be promoted for weight loss: FDA warns against HCG weight-loss products, and clinical evidence shows weight loss comes from severe calorie restriction rather than HCG.
description: HCG should not be promoted for weight loss: FDA warns against HCG weight-loss products, and clinical evidence shows weight loss comes from severe calorie restriction rather than HCG.
mechanisms: Placental Hormone Signaling (Not Proven for Obesity Treatment)
safetyNotes: FDA warns consumers to avoid HCG weight-loss products; severe calorie restriction can cause gallstones, electrolyte imbalance, and other harms
